title: triticum rectum
side_effects: Triticum rectum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high fiber content. In severe cases, excessive consumption may lead to electrolyte imbalances and dehydration. Additionally, some individuals may experience allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling, especially if they have pre-existing sensitivities to similar plant species. Prolonged or excessive use can also contribute to nutrient deficiencies, particularly in essential minerals like iron and magnesium.
